subject: Houses for sale
body:
I bought the Christies Great Estates catalog and there is a house in Australia ( search for CGE19534 at www.cristiesgreatestates.com )and a palace in Spain ( CGE19702 ) you might like..

We are delayed for another hour from now..on the plane.
Sent via BlackBerry by AT&T
